mapper.select: SELECT h.id AS id, h.title AS title, h.starts_at AS startsAt, h.ends_at AS endsAt, h.status AS status, COUNT(hp.product_option_id) AS productCount, COALESCE(SUM(hp.hot_deal_price), 0) AS discountPrice FROM hot_deals h LEFT JOIN hot_deal_products hp ON h.id = hp.hot_deal_id WHERE h.deleted_at IS NULL AND h.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'SCHEDULED') GROUP BY h.id, h.title, h.starts_at, h.ends_at, h.status ORDER BY h.starts_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hot_deals (created_by, title, description, starts_at, ends_at, status) VALUES (#{createdBy}, #{title}, #{description}, #{startsAt}, #{endsAt}, #{status})
INSERT INTO hot_deal_products (hot_deal_id, product_option_id, original_price, hot_deal_price) VALUES (#{hotDealId}, #{productOptionId}, #{originalPrice}, #{hotDealPrice})
